title: MCP for Open Data Portals: Trust Depends on Understanding the Data

title: New Uruguay/OKFN Partnership: Scaling reliable AI for open data across Latin America
content:
Together with AGESIC, we are piloting a traceable AI system with Uruguay’s open data catalogue – so that citizens can receive verifiable answers from national data

The post New Uruguay/OKFN Partnership: Scaling reliable AI for open data across Latin America first appeared on Open Knowledge Blog.
snippet: Together with AGESIC, we are piloting a traceable AI system with Uruguay’s open data catalogue – so that citizens can receive verifiable answers from national data

title: Announcing the Open Technology Research (OTR) Symposium 2026 in Barcelona

title: Brazil and OKFN partner to enable citizens to ‘talk’ to national data
